news.title: Mutual funds have increased their holdings in Vodafone Idea for the third consecutive quarter.
news.summary: Mutual funds have increased their holdings in Vodafone Idea for the third consecutive quarter.

news.title:
West Asia conflict and delayed tariff hikes are squeezing Indian telecom firms financially, raising energy and network equipment costs.
Higher diesel prices, 5G capex monetization delays, and inflationary pressures are impacting Bharti Airtel, Vodafone Idea, and Reliance Jio margins.
news.summary:
West Asia conflict and delayed tariff hikes are squeezing Indian telecom firms financially, raising energy and network equipment costs.
Higher diesel prices, 5G capex monetization delays, and inflationary pressures are impacting Bharti Airtel, Vodafone Idea, and Reliance Jio margins.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, Suzlon Energy among most traded stocks on NSE.
Nifty 50 dropped 2% amid geopolitical tensions; key indices fell over 1%.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, Suzlon Energy among most traded stocks on NSE.
Nifty 50 dropped 2% amid geopolitical tensions; key indices fell over 1%.

news.title:
TRAI's draft tariff changes may pressure telecom premiumisation, impacting ARPU expansion and revenue growth.
Vodafone Idea, with 65M feature phone users, risks Rs 1,200-1,250 cr revenue loss; Airtel faces Rs 1,400-1,450 cr impact.
news.summary:
TRAI's draft tariff changes may pressure telecom premiumisation, impacting ARPU expansion and revenue growth.
Vodafone Idea, with 65M feature phone users, risks Rs 1,200-1,250 cr revenue loss; Airtel faces Rs 1,400-1,450 cr impact.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea shares surged over 6% on AGR reassessment extension and strong trading volumes.
Analysts suggest holding positions, with target prices of ₹9.8-₹10.5 amid positive technical signals.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea shares surged over 6% on AGR reassessment extension and strong trading volumes.
Analysts suggest holding positions, with target prices of ₹9.8-₹10.5 amid positive technical signals.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea Ltd. gained 5.09%, outperforming Sensex's 3.57% rise by 1.52 points.
The rally raises questions on whether it's a recovery or a technical bounce.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea Ltd. gained 5.09%, outperforming Sensex's 3.57% rise by 1.52 points.
The rally raises questions on whether it's a recovery or a technical bounce.

news.title:
DoT extends Vodafone Idea's AGR reassessment deadline to June 30 due to operational hurdles.
Recalculation delays, legacy documentation gaps, and financial uncertainty weigh on Vodafone Idea's outlook.
news.summary:
DoT extends Vodafone Idea's AGR reassessment deadline to June 30 due to operational hurdles.
Recalculation delays, legacy documentation gaps, and financial uncertainty weigh on Vodafone Idea's outlook.

news.title:
DOT extends AGR re-assessment deadline for VI to June 30.
Change reported by CNBC Aawaz; gives VI more time for compliance.
news.summary:
DOT extends AGR re-assessment deadline for VI to June 30.
Change reported by CNBC Aawaz; gives VI more time for compliance.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, and Adani Power were top traded stocks on NSE, with notable volume spikes.
Vodafone Idea rose 1% after adding subscribers; Ola Electric surged 7% on strong sales; Adani Power gained 3% post MSEDCL award.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, and Adani Power were top traded stocks on NSE, with notable volume spikes.
Vodafone Idea rose 1% after adding subscribers; Ola Electric surged 7% on strong sales; Adani Power gained 3% post MSEDCL award.

news.title:
Swiggy, Eternal, and Nykaa are projected to show strong Q4 FY26 growth, with Swiggy's GOV up 21.6% YoY and Nykaa's revenue up 26% YoY.
Bharti Airtel and Jio expect stable growth, while Vodafone Idea may see subscriber losses; 5G rollout and debt updates are key.
news.summary:
Swiggy, Eternal, and Nykaa are projected to show strong Q4 FY26 growth, with Swiggy's GOV up 21.6% YoY and Nykaa's revenue up 26% YoY.
Bharti Airtel and Jio expect stable growth, while Vodafone Idea may see subscriber losses; 5G rollout and debt updates are key.

news.title: Vodafone Idea gains users after a 5-year period.
news.summary: Vodafone Idea gains users after a 5-year period.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea added 21,927 users in February, marking its first user gain in 5 years, raising its base to 198.4M.
The turnaround is driven by network expansion, government AGR relief, and plans for ₹25K crore funding for capex.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea added 21,927 users in February, marking its first user gain in 5 years, raising its base to 198.4M.
The turnaround is driven by network expansion, government AGR relief, and plans for ₹25K crore funding for capex.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea upgrades its transport network using Ciena's WL6e solution on the 6500 platform.
The modernization aims to help Vodafone Idea tap new business opportunities in India.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea upgrades its transport network using Ciena's WL6e solution on the 6500 platform.
The modernization aims to help Vodafone Idea tap new business opportunities in India.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea partners with Ericsson, Nokia, and Samsung to expand 5G to 90 cities by May 2026.
The nationwide 5G expansion aligns with Vodafone Idea's strategic growth plans in India.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea partners with Ericsson, Nokia, and Samsung to expand 5G to 90 cities by May 2026.
The nationwide 5G expansion aligns with Vodafone Idea's strategic growth plans in India.

news.title:
Supreme Court allows reconsideration of AGR dues for Vodafone Idea.
AGR order clarified to apply only to Vodafone Idea, reshaping its dues outlook.
news.summary:
Supreme Court allows reconsideration of AGR dues for Vodafone Idea.
AGR order clarified to apply only to Vodafone Idea, reshaping its dues outlook.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Filatex Fashions, Ola Electric among NSE's most traded stocks, despite market dip.
Vodafone Idea fell 2%, Filatex plunged 6%, while Ola Electric rose 6% amid its EndICEAge campaign.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Filatex Fashions, Ola Electric among NSE's most traded stocks, despite market dip.
Vodafone Idea fell 2%, Filatex plunged 6%, while Ola Electric rose 6% amid its EndICEAge campaign.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea gains relief with AGR liabilities frozen at Rs 87,695 cr and 5-year repayment deferment.
ARPU rose 7.3% YoY; DoT considers Rs 27,000 cr AGR dues cut, boosting investor confidence in turnaround.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea gains relief with AGR liabilities frozen at Rs 87,695 cr and 5-year repayment deferment.
ARPU rose 7.3% YoY; DoT considers Rs 27,000 cr AGR dues cut, boosting investor confidence in turnaround.

news.title:
Telecom tariff hike delayed to December; Jio & Airtel lead Jan 2026 subscriber additions.
Airtel dominates M2M subscriber market; Jio leads in 5G fixed wireless with 70% share.
news.summary:
Telecom tariff hike delayed to December; Jio & Airtel lead Jan 2026 subscriber additions.
Airtel dominates M2M subscriber market; Jio leads in 5G fixed wireless with 70% share.

news.title: Vodafone Idea and BSNL initiate discussions on sharing telecom infrastructure.
news.summary: Vodafone Idea and BSNL initiate discussions on sharing telecom infrastructure.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea shares rose 5.6% to ₹9.44 after slower subscriber attrition in Jan '26.
Vodafone Idea's user base fell by 4.1L in Jan, improving from Dec's 9.4L loss.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea shares rose 5.6% to ₹9.44 after slower subscriber attrition in Jan '26.
Vodafone Idea's user base fell by 4.1L in Jan, improving from Dec's 9.4L loss.
